body:
### Problem

ui2 crashes when :make outputs to stderr and foldmethod=indent is set

### Steps to reproduce

### 1. setup minimal.lua
```lua
vim.cmd("set shiftwidth=2")
vim.o.foldmethod="indent"
require('vim._core.ui2').enable({enable=true})
vim.o.makeprg = 'for i in $(seq 1 200); do printf "    line %d\\n" $i >&2; done'
```

### 2. run :make
```shell
nvim --clean -u minimal.lua
:e tmp.txt
:make
```

### Expected behavior

It should not crash.

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

v0.13.0-dev-68+gb64d96ed8d

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

n/a

### Operating system/version

macOS 14.2.1

### Terminal name/version

wezterm 20240203-110809-5046fc22 aarch64-apple-darwin

### $TERM environment variable

xterm-256color

### Installation

build from repo

labels.description: Nvim 0.12 mesages/dialog/pager/notifications based on the UI-ext protocol
labels.name: ui2

title: ui2: crash during :make with foldmethod=indent
